channel.title: Jose Fresco Blog
channel.description: Insights and reflections on building web applications, browser extensions, and automation tools

item.title: Pi Backups: Automating Offsite Backups for Raspberry Pi Applications
item.description: How I built a shell script system to automatically back up all my Raspberry Pi application data offsite — eliminating the SD card single-point-of-failure with rsync, SSH, and cron.

item.title: SafeShare: Clean Reddit Post Sharing with One-Click Bookmarklet
item.description: Introducing SafeShare — a clean reader view for Reddit posts with a one-click bookmarklet. No login walls, no app install prompts, just shareable links.

item.title: Arpy Assist: Qwen CLI Web Interface for Raspberry Pi
item.description: Introducing Arpy Assist — a web interface for Qwen CLI running on Raspberry Pi, accessible from anywhere via Cloudflare Tunnel.

item.title: Watch List: A Private JustWatch Alternative PWA Powered by TMDB
item.description: I built a private Progressive Web App to replace JustWatch — no ads, no tracking, no dark patterns. Just fast movie and TV search powered by the TMDB API.

item.title: JF Notify Launches - Instant Telegram Notifications for Gravity Forms
item.description: JF Notify (formerly Telegram Notifier for Gravity Forms) is now officially launched at jfnotify.com. Get instant Telegram notifications when Gravity Forms entries are submitted.

item.title: Moving JF Website Monitor from Vercel to Self-Hosting - Cost & Control
item.description: How I migrated JF Website Monitor from Vercel to a locally hosted solution to avoid high costs, Prisma DB limits, and cron-job.org dependence, with plans for future VPS deployment.

item.title: SLA Reporting with JF Website Monitor: Comprehensive Uptime Analytics
item.description: Learn how JF Website Monitor helps businesses maintain SLA compliance with detailed uptime reports, PDF exports, and comprehensive monitoring analytics.

item.title: Geekworm P173 Case: How This Aluminum Alloy Housing Dropped My Pi's CPU Temp by 20°C
item.description: Discover how the Geekworm P173 heavy-duty aluminum alloy case dramatically improved my Raspberry Pi's thermal performance, dropping CPU temperatures by 20°C and extending its lifespan.

item.title: My Raspberry Pi's New Job: From Web Host to AI Command Center
item.description: How I'm using a Raspberry Pi 4 with the Qwen CLI and Gemini CLI to manage my website hosted on GitHub Pages.

item.title: Moving Hosting from Raspberry Pi to GitHub Pages with Gemini AI
item.description: How I migrated my website from a Raspberry Pi Model B to GitHub Pages after AI experiments polluted my Pi. Using Gemini Chat AI instead of Claude Code for guidance.
